hypothesis: If NEB is executed via NN-BAX using a pre-trained EquiformerV2 that is iteratively fine-tuned on strategically acquired path points, then for LJ7 and LJ38 transitions it will recover ground-truth MEPs and barrier heights at comparable fmax/MAEi accuracy while requiring substantially fewer expensive simulator evaluations, because Bayesian acquisition focuses training on the most informative regions of the energy landscape.
